text_en: The General Assembly,
text_fr: The General Assembly,

text_en: Cons.idering that the resolution on Non-Self› Governing Peoples adopted during the first part of the first session of the General Assembly draw attention to the fact that the obligations accepted by Members of the United Nations under Chap› ter XI of the Charter are all ready in full force;
text_fr: Cons.idering that  the  resolution  on  Non-Self› Governing Peoples adopted during the first  part of the first session of the General Assembly draws attention to the fact that the obligations accepted by  Members of the United Nations under Chap› ter  XI  of  the  Charter are  already  in  full  force;

text_en: Recognizing the importance of the declaration contained in Chapter XI of the Charter specifically as it concerns the peace and security of the world, and the political, economic, social and educational advancement of the people of Non-Self› Governing Territories as well as their just treaty› ment and protection against abuses;
text_fr: Recognizing the importance of the declaration contained in Chapter XI of the Charter especially as it concerns the peace and security of the world, and the political, economic, social and educa› tional advancement of the peoples of Non-Self› Governing Territories as well as. their just treat› ment and protection against abuses;

text_en: 67 (I). Regional conferences of non-autonomous land-based representatives1
text_fr: 67  (I).  Conferences  regionales  de representants  de  territolre1 non  autonomes

text_en: The Assemblée ginerale,
text_fr: L' Assemblee ginerale,

text_en: Considering that the resolution adopted at the first part of the first session of the Asscmblee gcncralc on the non-self-governing populations draws attention to the fact that the obligations assumed by the United Nations under Chapter XI of the Charter are already fully in force;
text_fr: Considerant que  la  resolution  prise relative› ment aux populations non autonomes et adoptee !ors de Ja  premiere partie de la premiere session de  I' Asscmblee  gcncralc  attire  )'attention sur  le fait  que  les  obligations recbnnues  par Jes  Mem› bres  des  Nations  Unies  aux  termes  du  Cha› pitre XI de  la  Charte  sont  deja  pleinement en vigueur;

text_en: Recognising the importance of the declaration contained in Chapter XI of the Charter, in particular in the CP concerning peace and security the development of non-European populations in the political, economic, social and educational fields and the application to these populations of 'suitable' treatment and fair protection against abuse;
text_fr: Reconnaissant )'importance de  la  declaration qui  figure  au  Chapitre XI de la Charte,  notam› ment  en CP qui  concerne  la  paix  et  la  securit~ mondiales,  le  progrb des  populations  non  au~ nomes dans les domaines politique, economique. social  et educatif et !'application a ces  popula› tions  d'un traitement '~uitable et  d'une juste protection contre les  abus;

text_en: Recommendations all Memben having or assuming responsibilities for the administration of Non› Self-Government Territories to agree confer› ences of representatives of Non-Self-Government Peoples involved or preferred chosen in such a way that the representation of the people will be assured to the extent that the particular conditions of the territory concerned permit, in order that effect may be given to the letter and spirit of Chapter XI of the Charter and that the wishes and aspirations of the Non-Self-Government Peoples may be expressly stated.
text_fr: Recommends all Memben having or assuming responsibilities  for  the  administration  of  Non› Self-Governing  Territories  to  convene  confer› ences  of  representatives  of  Non-Self-Governing Peoples  chosen  or preferably  elected  in  such  a way that the representation of the people will be ensured to the extent that the particular condi› tions of the territory concerned permit, in order that effect  may  be given  to  the letter and spirit of Chapter XI of the Charter and that the wishes and  aspirations of the Non-Self-Governing Peoples may be expressed.

text_en: Sixth-fourth plenary meeting, r4 December r946.
text_fr: Sixty-fourth  plenary meeting, r4  December r946.

text_en: Recommends to the Members who have or assume the administration of the CJD of Non-Self-Governing Territories, to convene conferences of representatives of non-self-governing populations, chosen OR preferably elected, in order to ensure the representation of the population to the extent that they will enable them to do so, in order to realize the spirit and letter of Chapter XI of the Charter and thus enable the feelings and aspirations of the non-self-governing populations to be expressed.
text_fr: Recommande a tons les  Membres qui ont ou qui assument l'administratiCJD de territoires non autonomes,  de  convoquer  des  conferences  de representants  de  populations  non  autonomes, choisis OU preferablement elus, de fa~on  a assurer la representation de la population dans la mesure oil  le  permettront  Jes  conditions  particulieres du  territoire  considere,  afin  de  realiser  l'esprit et la  lettre  du  Chapitre XI de la  Charte  et  de permettre ainsi aux sentiments et aux aspirations des  populations  non  autonomes  de  s'exprimer.
